name: Plot Director
description: Quietly maintains a hidden overarching plotline. Nudges the storyteller only when the story stalls, and re-plans when the player takes the story in a new direction. Check vague progress with /plot.

plot_enabled.label: Plot Direction
plot_enabled.description: Maintain a hidden plot outline and gently nudge the story when it stalls. One background LLM call per assessment.

assessment_frequency.label: Assessment Frequency (turns)
assessment_frequency.description: Check plot progress every N turns.

stall_threshold.label: Stall Threshold (checks)
stall_threshold.description: Number of consecutive no-progress checks before a subtle nudge is injected into the storyteller prompt.

opportunity_nudges.label: Opportunistic Nudges
opportunity_nudges.description: Also nudge when a scene presents a natural opening for the plot, even before the stall threshold is reached.
